videos.title: Why Hasn't Anybody Tried This Vivi Deck?
videos.description:
Everybody keeps talking about Vivi but nobody is trying this version of Vivi on the ladder when its one of the more ambitious builds :)

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-why-hasn-t-anybody-tried-this-vivi-deck
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7336340#paper
